name: Neon Glow Text
description: A vibrant neon glow text effect with pulsing animation that alternates between two neon colors, creating a retro cyberpunk aesthetic.
code: NEON

name: Wavy Letter Text
description: Individual letters animate in a wave-like motion with staggered delays, creating a playful ripple effect across the text.
code: W A V E

name: 3D Spin Text
description: Text rotates continuously in 3D space on the Y-axis with vibrant text-shadow layers that create a convincing 3D depth effect.
code: SPIN

name: Glitch Distortion Text
description: A glitch effect that uses pseudo-elements and clip-path to create digital distortion across the text, simulating a corrupted display.
code: GLITCH

name: Text Mask Shimmer
description: A background image is clipped to the text shape and animated horizontally, creating a sleek shimmering metallic sweep effect.
code: SHIMMER

name: Typewriter Cursor Text
description: A classic typewriter effect where text is revealed letter-by-letter with a blinking cursor, using only CSS width animation and border tricks.
code: Hello, World!

name: Dancing Shadow Text
description: Text shadows dynamically shift in diagonal directions with alternating colors, creating a lively dancing shadow effect around the letters.
code: DANCE

name: Slide-In Split Text
description: Two halves of text slide in from opposite directions and snap together at the center, creating a dramatic reveal entrance animation.
code: CONNECT

name: Pulse Glow Text
description: A pulsing heartbeat glow effect where the text rhythmically brightens and dims, simulating a neon sign power fluctuation.
code: PULSE

name: Fade In Blur Text
description: Text transitions from a blurred, invisible state to sharp clarity, creating a cinematic focus reveal effect.
code: FOCUS

name: Bouncing Letter Text
description: Each letter independently bounces up and down like a basketball with staggered timing, creating an energetic, playful typographic animation.
code: B O U N C E

name: Flip 3D Reveal Text
description: Text performs a 3D flip on the X-axis from invisible to fully visible, with perspective depth for a realistic card-flip effect.
code: FLIP

name: Rainbow Gradient Text
description: An animated rainbow gradient scrolls continuously through the text, cycling through the full color spectrum for a vibrant, colorful effect.
code: RAINBOW

name: Scale Burst Text
description: Text rapidly scales up from nothing with a burst effect, accompanied by a radial burst ring that expands and fades outward.
code: BOOM

name: Matrix Rain Text
description: A Matrix-inspired digital rain effect with green glowing text, a repeating gradient rain background, and subtle glitch clip-path distortion.
code: MATRIX

name: Explosive Letter Burst on Hover
description: An explosive visual effect triggered on hover where the text enlarges and two circular bursts radiate outward using ::before/::after pseudo-elements with radial gradients, simulating a colorful explosion.
code: BURST

name: Melting Text
description: A melting text effect where the text visually appears to droop and dissolve downward, resembling liquid dripping, using pseudo-elements with blur filters and drip keyframes.
code: MELT

name: Glowing 3D Text
description: A glowing 3D text effect by Bennett Feely that combines dynamic 3D rotation with color-transitioning glow, using multiple stacked text layers at different Z depths with preserve-3d and rotate3d transforms.
code: 3D GLOW

name: HEY 3D Pulsing Text
description: A vibrant 3D pulsing text animation by Radu Bratan that uses dynamic shadows and CSS transforms to create a heartbeat-like effect, with bold colors and energetic movement.
code: HEY!

name: 3D Text Marquee Effect
description: A 3D text marquee by Comehope that creates the illusion of text passing through the corner of a 3D box by combining perspective transforms, clipping, and smooth marquee motion.
code: SCROLLING TEXT IN 3D SPACE — SCROLLING TEXT IN 3D SPACE —

name: Nabla Color Font Animation
description: A pulsing 3D depth effect by Scott Kellum using the Nabla variable color font with font-variation-settings to dynamically adjust extrusion depth, creating a cascading staggered animation across letters.
code: C O L O R

name: 3D Cylinder Rotate Text
description: A 3D rotation animation by Emilio where text rotates continuously along the X-axis and is arranged in a circular cylinder formation using preserve-3d, perspective, and transforms.
code: EAT SLEEP RAVE REPEAT EAT SLEEP RAVE REPEAT

name: Slide-In Text with Cycling Background
description: A slide-in text animation by Yemon that combines classic slide-in text reveal with cycling background colors, using roll and bg keyframes to drop text into view while the background shifts through a color palette.
code: WELCOME

name: Gooey Marquee Text
description: A gooey marquee effect by Amit Sheen where text melts out of one side of a glowing wall and melts into the other side, using CSS filters to create a fluid, organic ghost-like motion.
code: GOOEY TEXT EFFECT — GOOEY TEXT EFFECT —

name: Ghosts and Ghouls Text Effect
description: A ghost-like animation by Sicontis where a ghost icon passes through text using mix-blend-mode: exclusion, creating a dynamic color inversion effect as the ghost moves across the words.
code:
👻 GHOSTS

👻

name: Schitt's Creek Title Animation
description: A multi-keyframe title reveal by Rob that animates text groups with pop-word rotation, shimmer sparkle effects, and staggered bar reveals for a polished TV title sequence style.
code: SCHITT CREEK s

name: Text Frame Border Rotation
description: A unique animation by Fernando Cohen where individual characters rotate around the edges of a picture frame using the rotate() function within a frameMove keyframe, with interactive hover effects.
code: R O T A T E

name: Typewriter Text Animation Variant
description: A second typewriter text effect with a blinking cursor and multi-line reveal, using width animation and border tricks to type out text character by character in pure CSS.
code:
Hello, World!

This is CSS

name: Smoke Dissolve Text
description: Letters dissolve upward into smoke-like particles using CSS filter blur and opacity transitions with staggered delays, creating an ethereal disappearing effect.
code: S M O K E

name: Electric Shock Text
description: A high-voltage electric effect where text jitters with neon yellow sparks using clip-path glitch segments and rapid translation for a stunning shock visual.
code: ⚡SHOCK⚡

name: Text Color Cycling Effect
description: A smooth continuous color cycling animation where the text hue shifts through the full spectrum using filter hue-rotate, creating a simple but captivating rainbow morphing effect.
code: COLORS

name: Perspective Tilt Text
description: Text that dynamically tilts in 3D space on hover using perspective and rotateX/rotateY transforms that respond to cursor position with a smooth transition for an interactive depth effect.
code: TILT

name: Kinetic Pendulum Text
description: Individual letters swing back and forth like pendulums with varying pivot points and staggered timing, creating an energetic kinetic typography effect.
code: S W I N G

name: Text Stroke Fill Animation
description: Text transitions from an outlined stroke-only state to a filled solid state, with the stroke color dynamically cycling, creating a bold reveal effect reminiscent of comic book lettering.
code: STROKE

name: Countdown Number Wheel
description: A vertical number wheel that cycles through digits like a countdown timer, using transform translateY to scroll numbers into view with a slot-machine style animation.
code: 3210

name: Word Rotating Carousel
description: A vertical word carousel where words rotate into view one after another with a smooth sliding animation, perfect for showcasing multiple phrases in a single text space.
code: CREATE BUILD DESIGN CREATE

name: Shutter Reveal Text
description: A dramatic shutter/blinds reveal effect where vertical bars parting from the center reveal text beneath, using clip-path animation on a pseudo-element overlay.
code: REVEAL

name: Water Ripple Text Effect
description: A tranquil water ripple effect where text gently undulates with wave-like motion, using translateY and scale transforms with staggered delays to simulate rippling water.
code: W A V E S

name: Burning Fire Text
description: A blazing fire text effect with flickering orange, red, and yellow gradients, combined with a subtle blur and scale animation to simulate crackling flames consuming the letters.
code: FIRE

name: Neon Sign Flicker Text
description: A realistic broken neon sign effect where the text flickers on and off intermittently with varying speed, simulating an old neon tube that struggles to stay lit.
code: OPEN
